false_positive_snippets.description: Using fromstring to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace fromstring with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.
false_positive_snippets.tool_snippet:
4 from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
5 from xml.etree.ElementTree import fromstring
6 from defusedxml.elementtree import fromstring as safe_fromstring
